content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on Jun 29, 2026, focused on hardening the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, finalizing the monetized app deployment lifecycle, and stabilizing the agent orchestrator. Significant progress was made in security auditing, payment integrity, and improving the developer experience through new CLI migration tools and automated testing harnesses.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Monetization**
*   Implemented a full domain search-to-buy flow in the UI and added cron-based renewal billing and health probes ([#10307](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10307), [#10303](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10303)).
*   Enabled open-to-everyone app deployment and added a complete create-deploy-delete lifecycle for monetized apps ([#10298](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10298), [#10290](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10290)).
*   Hardened payment paths by closing cross-tenant holes and fixing credit refund logic ([#10297](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10297), [#10278](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10278)).
*   Addressed a critical privilege escalation vulnerability regarding verified email requirements for admin grants ([#10273](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10273)).

**Agent Orchestration & Stability**
*   Introduced distinct task rooms for spawned coding swarms and a live orchestrator room view for monitoring agent swarms ([#10257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10257), [#10256](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10256)).
*   Implemented crash/restart stability matrices and fault injection to ensure agent resilience ([#10223](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10223)).
*   Enabled agents to list and describe Eliza Cloud apps across all connectors ([#10277](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10277)).

**UI/UX & Developer Experience**
*   Regenerated launcher view icons using AI-driven vector generation and resolved view IDs to launcher icons ([#10294](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10294), [#10292](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10292)).
*   Added a first-class `elizaos migrate-agent` CLI command to support OpenClaw to Eliza migration ([#10211](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10211)).
*   Implemented a full-journey walkthrough generator for automated UI smoke testing ([#10249](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10249)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#10296](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10296): Hardening the `migrate-agent` reader for OpenClaw home-format variants.
*   [#10293](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10293): Management actions for cloud apps (monetization, earnings, key rotation).
*   [#10291](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10291): UI fix for co-rendering connector setup panels.
*   [#10286](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10286): Clearing verify gate drift.
*   [#10284](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10284) & [#10282](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10282): Version-robust reader and hardening for `migrate-agent`.
*   [#10268](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10268): Chat-centric in-chat onboarding.
*   [#10238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10238): Gating domain registration on credit deduction success.
*   [#10229](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10229): Launch hardening (logging, retryable SSE, picker error handling).
*   [#10220](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10220): Real core recall harness and CI gate.
*   [#10214](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10214): Heap capping for feed-web builds to prevent OOM.
*   [#10210](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/10210): Release promotion (develop to main).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No specific issues were marked as closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were reported in the provided data.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
